content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09A","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09A named J09A_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both conditions are met:
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2024
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09A including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09A named J09A_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both conditions are met:
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2024
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09A including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

# Table: decision_table

HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

# Table: eabl
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
Geplante Ableseart (INTEGER) Planned reading type
MR type (TEXT) Meter reading type code
MR TYPE TEXT (TEXT) Meter Reading type description
MR category (TEXT) Meter reading category
ISTABLART_TXT (TEXT) Actual reading type description (SAP)
LOGIKZW (TEXT) Logic indicator
KENNZIFF (TEXT) Identification number

# Table: eanl

process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_temp; CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT; UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.EQUNR) FROM J09A_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09A_temp.HAUS),0) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END; UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld'); DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_final; CREATE TABLE J09A_final AS SELECT t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ABLEINH, t.TOUR, t.ME_MA_ID, t.CITY1, t.CITY2, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.POST_CODE1, t.EQUNR, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) AS TITLE, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.TITLE END AS NET_TITLE_UNUSED, COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1, t.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1_MASTER, COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1, t.CITY1) AS CITY1_MASTER, COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2, t.CITY2) AS CITY2_MASTER, COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) AS EMAIL, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.EQUNR END AS NET_EQUNR_UNUSED, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EQUNR ELSE NULL END AS SALES_EQUNR_USED FROM J09A_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg ON eablg.Installation = t.ANLAGE LEFT JOIN net_master n ON n.EQUNR = t.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON s.EQUNR = t.EQUNR; UPDATE J09A_final SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT DISTINCT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024') AND EQUNR IN (SELECT DISTINCT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023');

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.EQUNR) FROM J09A_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09A_temp.HAUS),0) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld')

CREATE TABLE J09A_final AS SELECT t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ABLEINH, t.TOUR, t.ME_MA_ID, t.CITY1, t.CITY2, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.POST_CODE1, t.EQUNR, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1, t.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1_OUT, COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1, t.CITY1) AS CITY1_OUT, COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2, t.CITY2) AS CITY2_OUT, COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM J09A_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg ON eablg.Installation = t.ANLAGE LEFT JOIN net_master n ON n.EQUNR = t.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON s.EQUNR = t.EQUNR

UPDATE J09A_final SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT DISTINCT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024') AND EQUNR IN (SELECT DISTINCT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023')

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1_OUT AS POST_CODE1, CITY1_OUT AS CITY1, CITY2_OUT AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1_OUT AS POST_CODE1, CITY1_OUT AS CITY1, CITY2_OUT AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING'

kwargs.content:
Process J09A completed.

- Exported `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv` with 666 rows and sent to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
- Exported `J09A.csv` with 20200 rows and sent to `meter.readings@evu.com`
- Temporary table `J09A_temp` deleted

Note: a working table `J09A_final` was created to complete the joins and exports; only the temporary table explicitly requested in the process was deleted.
